mapper.sql: application_id, recruitment_id, applicant_user_id, application_status, apply_remark, review_remark, reviewer_user_id, review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_recruitment_application_info ( recruitment_id, applicant_user_id, application_status, apply_remark, review_remark, reviewer_user_id, review_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{recruitmentId}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicationStatus}, #{applyRemark}, #{reviewRemark}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE team_recruitment_application_info SET recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId}, applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId}, application_status = #{applicationStatus}, apply_remark = #{applyRemark}, review_remark = #{reviewRemark}, reviewer_user_id = #{reviewerUserId}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM team_recruitment_application_info WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM team_recruitment_application_info WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE application_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 2 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 3 ELSE 99 END ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM team_recruitment_application_info WHERE recruitment_id = #{recruitmentId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT recruitment_id FROM team_recruitment_application_info WHERE applicant_user_id = #{applicantUserId} AND deleted = 0
AND recruitment_id IN
#{recruitmentId}
GROUP BY recruitment_id

SELECT
FROM team_recruitment_application_info WHERE application_status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
